failedAssertions.reason: Representative source-level naming bridge still fails because `mux.handle_func(...)` is rejected with `no method 'handle_func' on type http::ServeMux`.
A single program that combines `use net::http`, snake_case stdlib calls, PascalCase stdlib types, and `mux.handle_func(...)` still fails because `http::ServeMux` has no `handle_func` method.
